_instructions: SISTER: Update your about page values and why choose section here.

_fields.title: Section title as shown to customers

whyChoose.title: Premium Quality
whyChoose.description: We use only the finest materials and artisanal craftsmanship techniques to ensure every gift is built to last generations.

whyChoose.title: Personal Touch
whyChoose.description: Every piece is uniquely crafted to tell your personal story, making each gift as individual as the person receiving it.

whyChoose.title: Timely Delivery
whyChoose.description: We understand the importance of special moments and guarantee your handcrafted gift will arrive exactly when you need it.

values.title: Love in Every Detail
values.description: We pour genuine care and attention into every aspect of our craft, ensuring each gift carries the love it's meant to express.

values.title: Sustainable Practices
values.description: We are committed to environmental responsibility, using eco-friendly materials and sustainable crafting methods in all our creations.

values.title: Community Connection
values.description: We believe in supporting local artisans and giving back to our community through workshops and charitable partnerships.

values.title: Lasting Memories
values.description: Our mission is to create heirloom-quality gifts that will be treasured for generations, preserving precious memories forever.
